description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers, predominantly black and white in color, with a classic basketball-inspired silhouette. The shoes feature a smooth white base with black overlays on the toe, eyelets, heel, and Swoosh logo, creating a bold contrast. The lateral side of the ankle area displays a prominent white winged basketball logo, characteristic of the Air Jordan brand. The shoes have black laces threaded through multiple eyelets, and the tongue is topped with a white Jumpman logo. The midsole is white, while the outsole is black, providing a clean and sporty look. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic leather, rubber, and foam for comfort and durability.
description: A pair of high-top black and white athletic sneakers with bold overlays, a winged basketball logo, and black laces, designed for urban and sporty use.
description_view_0: Side view showing both shoes, highlighting the black Swoosh, white winged logo, and the contrast between the black overlays and white base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the toe box perforations, black laces, and the white Jumpman logo on the tongue.
description_view_2: Angled side view emphasizing the lateral branding, lace structure, and the overall sleek silhouette.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded heel collars and the back seam details of both shoes.
attribute_logo: White winged basketball logo on the lateral ankle and white Jumpman logo on the tongue.
